description: Immutable append-only audit trail with hash-chain tamper evidence. Records every domain event across all product scopes.

retentionYears.description: Number of years to retain audit entries. Defaults to 7. Products override via binding manifest.

encryptAtRest.description: Whether audit entries are encrypted at rest. Defaults to false.

sinkType.description: Storage sink type: APPEND_ONLY_LOG, JDBC, or IN_MEMORY. Defaults to IN_MEMORY (use JDBC in production).

hashAlgorithm.description: Hash algorithm for chain integrity: SHA-256 (default) or SHA-512.
